titlestmt.titleproper: Hotel School video, film and tape collection28-11-3951
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-02-04 18:18:32 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Hotel School video, film and tape collection

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

did.abstract: Includes VHS, 3/4" and betamax tapes of Hotel Ezra Cornell (HEC) Events; Management Intern Program (MIP); Hotel School Courses; Hotel School Events, Development, History and films of Campus Scenes, the Meek Children and Company Films.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes VHS, 3/4" and betamax tapes of Hotel Ezra Cornell (HEC) Events; Management Intern Program (MIP); Hotel School Courses; Hotel School Events, Development, History and films of Campus Scenes, the Meek Children, and Company Films.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. School of Hotel Administration Courses Boxes 1-7
Series II. School of Hotel Administration Events, Development, and History Boxes 7-10
Series III. School of Hotel Administration Hotel Ezra Cornell (HEC) Events Boxes 11-14
Series IV. School of Hotel Administration Management Intern Program (MIP) Boxes 15-16
Series V. Films and Cassette Tapes Boxes 17

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Hotel School Video Collection, #28-11-3951. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Hotel management -- Study and teaching.
Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration -- : Societies, etc.

did.unittitle: Series V. Films and Cassette Tapes
Cornell Sports Review - 3 or 4 football games, horse show, boat races
Cornell Campus Scenes - given by Ashbery
Proctor and Gamble Film "Two Headed Coin"
Campbell Soup Company Film "The Great Sauce Revolution"
Film - "Highlights of the National Restaurant Show"
Film - "The Front Desk" - National Education Media
Filmstrip - American Hotel Association Presentation "Preparing the Guest Room"
Filmstrip - American Hotel Association Presentation "Food Service"
Filmstrip - American Hotel Association Presentation "Rooming the Guest"
Filmstrip - American Hotel Association Presentation "Front Office Courtesy"
Filmstrip - American Hotel Association Presentation "Fire Prevention"
Filmstrip - The Stouffer Restaurant Corp. "Food for Thought"
Filmstrip - Metropolitan Wire Goods Corp. - "Handling Without Hands"
Filmstrip - Swift and Company - "Food for Life"
Filmstrip - "Smoothing the Flow of Restaurant Hospitality"
Windows on the World I - New York City Tour
Windows on the World II - New York City Tour
End of Waldorf New York City Tour - Rainbow Room
End of Waldorf New York City Tour
World Trade Center - New York City Tour
World Trade Center - New York City Tour
Music for Hong Kong Film - Hawaii and L.A. Lectures
Rossmoor Program on Lebanon - Hong Kong Narration
